homepage.title: Andy Slaughter MP
headings: h3: Thank you for voting in Hammersmith and Chiswick
homepage.text_excerpt: Andy Slaughter MP Skip to main content Andy Slaughter MP Labour MP for Hammersmith & Chiswick Facebook Twitter Donate About In Parliament Blog Sign up to my newsletter Contact More Menu Andy Slaughter MP Fighting for you in Hammersmith and Chiswick Andy Slaughter Thank you for voting in Hammersmith and Chiswick Thank you to everyone who voted in Hammersmith and Chiswick in the General Election. A special thanks if you voted for me, but my job as MP is to represent all constituents so I am grateful to everyone who took part in the election. I’ve represented people across west London for 40 years including, since 2010, as MP for Hammersmith. I enjoy living and working in the place that has always been my home and supporting local communities. You can read Hansard to find out what I’ve been doing in Parliament , or read my latest blog to learn more about my local campaigning. I also send out a regular email newsletter, and you can sign up here . You can also follow what I’m doing on Twitter and Facebook or ask me any questions by emailing andy@andyslaughter.com . I am uniquely privileged to be MP for such a diverse part of London with many problems to solve but many more opportunities and great communities. Andy Slaughter Labour MP for Hammersmith & Chiswick Follow on social media Latest News See more Andy Slaughter April Newsletter blog 24 April 2026 Andy Slaughter March Newsletter blog 20 March 2026 Andy Slaughter February newsletter blog 19 February 2026 Andy Slaughter MP Contact details 28 Greyhound Road, London, W6 8NX 28 Greyhound Road, London, W6 8NX '> View on Google Maps Email: andy@andyslaughter.com Further details Promoted on behalf of Andy Slaughter by Nikos Souslous, both at 28 Greyhound Road, London, W6 8NX. ©2026 Copyright Andy Slaughter - All rights reserved. pages.title: About - Andy Slaughter MP
pages.text_excerpt: About - Andy Slaughter MP Skip to main content Andy Slaughter MP Labour MP for Hammersmith & Chiswick Facebook Twitter Donate About In Parliament Blog Sign up to my newsletter Contact More Menu About Andy Slaughter has been Labour Member of Parliament for Hammersmith and Chiswick since 2024. He had previously been MP for Hammersmith from 2010 to 2024 and the MP for Ealing, Acton and Shepherd’s Bush from 2005 to 2010. Before that he was the Leader of the London Borough of Hammersmith and Fulham Council. Early life Andy was born in Fulham in 1960. He was educated at Peterborough Primary School in Fulham and Latymer Upper School in Hammersmith. He later read English at the University of Exeter between 1979 and 1982. For the next 16 years he lived in Fulham before moving in 1998 to Shepherds Bush. Employment history In the 1980s Andy had a number of jobs in the voluntary and public sectors. Andy worked for the British Safety Council, and then for Hammersmith & Fulham Council. He then worked as an adviser to Michael Meacher MP, Shadow Secretary for Employment and later Social Security. Following this he worked as a researcher for the BBC. Andy studied Law, and became a barrister in 1993. He practised from Bridewell Chambers in Blackfriars, specialising in personal injury and housing law. He stopped practising when elected as MP for Ealing, Acton & Shepherds Bush in 2005. Political and community activity In 1983 Andy joined the Fulham Labour Party. He became a councillor for Gibbs Green ward in 1986, and from 2002 for the North End ward in West Kensington. He held his seat for 20 years, being elected Deputy Leader in 1991 and Leader in 1996, and stepped down in 2005 when elected as an MP. He served for twenty years as a director of Broadway (now part of St Mungo’s), a local charity for the single homeless. He was a trustee of Hammersmith & Fulham Law Centre for over 30 years, stepping down in January 2021, and remains a patron. He was a governor of William Morris Sixth Form in Barons Court until 2020, a school which he helped to establish in 1994. Andy is currently a patron of The Upper Room, a Shepherds Bush charity supporting homeless people and ex-offenders. Parliamentary career Andy stood unsuccessfully at the Uxbridge by-election in July 1997. He was elected as MP for Ealing, Acton and Shepherd’s Bush in London in the 2005 election after the retirement of veteran Labour MP Clive Soley. In 2005, the Ealing, Acton and Shepherd’s Bush constituency underwent a boundary change for the 2010 general election. In 2006, the newly formed Hammersmith Constituency Labour Party selected Andy as the Labour candidate for the new Hammersmith seat, which he won in the 2010 general election and held in 2015, 2017 and 2019. Andy has been a member of the following select committees: Communities and Local Government; Joint Committee on Human Rights; Children, Schools and Families; and Justice. He speaks regularly in the House of Commons on a range of local, national and international issues. Here is a link to his recent contributions in Parliament . He is a Vice-Chair of the Britain-Palestine All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) and en Executive Member of Labour Friends of Palestine and the Middle East. His interests are reflected in the other APPGs of which he is a member, including: Democracy and Human Rights in the Gulf; Fire Safety and Rescue; Gypsies, Roma and Travellers; Airport Communities; Access to Justice; Leasehold Reform. Andy has campaigned against Heathrow expansion. He also successfully campaigned against the planned demolition of Charing Cross Hospital and the planned demolition of West Kensington Estate in his constituency. In June 2023, with other west London MPs, he began a campaign against the Government’s withdrawal of Charing Cross and Hammersmith Hospitals from the 2030 New Hospital Programme. pages.title: Contact - Andy Slaughter MP
headings: h3: When writing to me, please ensure that you include your full name, full postal address and a contact telephone number. I will get back to you as soon as I can.
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Andy Slaughter MP Skip to main content Andy Slaughter MP Labour MP for Hammersmith & Chiswick Facebook Twitter Donate About In Parliament Blog Sign up to my newsletter Contact More Menu Contact When writing to me, please ensure that you include your full name, full postal address and a contact telephone number. I will get back to you as soon as I can. Email: andy.slaughter.mp@parliament.uk Post: Andy Slaughter MP 28 Greyhound Road London W6 8NX Phone: 020 7610 1950 We always do our best to assist everyone as quickly as possible but we are not, nor can we pretend to be, an emergency service. We aim to respond to enquiries within 2-3 weeks.
